raw:
CONCORD - Feedback

- The channel labels get covered upo too easily by the buttons nearby. The text shouldnt start disappearing until the user drage the pane basically on top of it.

- I need to be able to drag the channels around to reorder them. same goes for servers.

- change the channel labels. so they have their functions built into the tile rather than using buttons to the side. double clickling on a channel syhould allow me to rename it.

- the interface to add and delete channels should be moved to the admin panel. This leaves all the room for the channel labels to sisplay properly.

- notification badges arent displayed on a selected channel. Also messages that come in while I am looking at a chat dont get flagged as seen. When I click away I suddenly see that I have an unread message. But its the same message I just left.

- I need to be able to see a green badge when there are users currently using a server. unless that server is private.
optimized:
### OPT-001: Fix channel label truncation from adjacent buttons
Channel labels in the sidebar are being obscured by nearby buttons at reasonable pane widths. Adjust layout so labels only truncate/ellipsize when the user drags the pane nearly on top of the label text. Ensure buttons do not overlay label area at default widths.

Source: "The channel labels get covered upo too easily by the buttons nearby..."

### OPT-002: Drag-to-reorder channels and servers
Implement drag-and-drop reordering for both channels (within a server) and servers (within the server list). Persist new order to backend.

Source: "I need to be able to drag the channels around to reorder them. same goes for servers."

### OPT-003: Redesign channel tiles with inline controls and double-click rename
Move channel action controls from side buttons into the channel tile itself. Add double-click handler on channel tile to trigger inline rename.

Source: "change the channel labels. so they have their functions built into the tile rather than using buttons to the side. double clickling on a channel syhould allow me to rename it."

### OPT-004: Move channel add/delete UI to admin panel
Remove add-channel and delete-channel controls from the channel sidebar. Relocate them to the admin panel. This frees sidebar space for full channel label display.

Source: "the interface to add and delete channels should be moved to the admin panel..."

### OPT-005: Show notification badges on currently-selected channel
Notification badges are currently hidden when a channel is selected. Render badges on selected channels as well, so incoming messages are visible without switching away.

Source: "notification badges arent displayed on a selected channel."

### OPT-006: Mark messages as read in real time while viewing chat
Messages received while the user is actively viewing a chat are incorrectly flagged unread on channel switch. Mark messages as read immediately upon arrival if their channel is currently focused, so switching away does not resurface already-seen messages.

Source: "Also messages that come in while I am looking at a chat dont get flagged as seen. When I click away I suddenly see that I have an unread message. But its the same message I just left."

### OPT-007: Green presence badge on servers with active users
Display a green badge on server tiles when one or more users are currently active on that server. Suppress the badge for servers marked private.

Source: "I need to be able to see a green badge when there are users currently using a server. unless that server is private."
